projects.title: ComfyUI Infinite You
projects.description: ComfyUI node implementing ByteDance Infinite You for identity-preserving image generation — multi-face support, gaze control, and Flux integration.

projects.title: Comfy Nodekit
projects.description: Python toolkit for building ComfyUI workflows programmatically — typed node wrappers, graph primitives, and JSON export for the ComfyUI API.

projects.title: Commoditising Self-Supervision Led Pre-Trained Models For Medical Imaging
projects.description: KTH II2202 project — lung segmentation pre-processing and contrastive SSL pre-training on chest X-rays (CheXpert, VinBig) to build reusable foundation models for downstream diagnosis.

projects.title: From Synthetic to Natural – Single Natural Image Dehazing Deep Networks Using Synthetic Dataset Domain Randomization
projects.description: Journal of Visual Communication and Image Representation. Domain randomization for single-image dehazing with synthetic-to-real transfer.

projects.title: Cervix Type Detection Using a Self-Supervision Boosted Object Detection Technique
projects.description: International Journal of Imaging Systems and Technology. Self-supervised pretraining for cervical image object detection.

projects.title: Lowe's Store Navigator
projects.description: Top 10 in India at the Lowe's hackathon — modified A* pathfinding app to navigate customers through a store layout and optimize multi-item shopping trips.

projects.title: Lift
projects.description: Single-car elevator controller implemented in Verilog — floor tracking, request queueing, and door control logic.

projects.title: Pong on MSP430
projects.description: Classic Pong implemented on an MSP430 microcontroller, rendered on an 8×8 LED matrix display.

projects.title: SynEnv — Synthetic Dataset Generation
projects.description: Unity3D synthetic data generator for training vision models — keypoint detection, depth maps, object localization, and classification from procedurally spawned 3D scenes.

projects.title: Depth Perception Using RGB Images
projects.description: Extracted depth from RGB images using a GAN, trained on synthetically generated depth datasets from Unity3D.

projects.title: Ball-E
projects.description: An adventure game built in Unity3D, exploring physics, level design, and interactive gameplay mechanics built when I was in high school.
